offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 legal invoices/month, discrepancies cause accounting errors. We automate the compilation and flagging of discrepancies instead of manual review of invoices.
problem: Discrepancies in legal invoices lead to accounting errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry on a few items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
